asset_type: Product-led TaraHome article cover for tado X with Home Assistant
input_image: Official tado X product-family photograph from tado's compatibility page
prompt: Use case: product-photo background replacement for a TaraHome editorial article cover. Keep the real tado X product group as the hero and preserve every visible tado device exactly as photographed: identical device count, model shapes, proportions, placement, display graphics, physical controls, logos, white and black finishes, shadows, and front-facing product geometry. Replace only the plain white studio backdrop and ground with a believable warm residential setting: a natural-oak sideboard, softly textured warm off-white plaster, gentle window daylight, and restrained dark forest-green accents. Landscape editorial hero, approximately 5:3, products fully visible and sharp, background softly out of focus. No people, added devices, headline, caption, watermark, UI cards, translucent panels, inset frames, network lines, charts, progress bars, icons, diagrams, glowing effects, or sci-fi styling.
